steps.action: Click the 'You pay' token selector button
steps.expected: Modal opens with search input and CASH/USDC token rows including icon, name, ticker, and balance value/placeholder
steps.observed: Modal opened with search input 'Search by name or ticker'; rows showed CASH and USD Coin (USDC) with icon initials and visible balance placeholder '—'.

steps.action: Select USDC from the token list
steps.expected: Modal closes and selected input token updates
steps.observed: Modal closed and the 'You pay' selector updated from CASH to USDC.

evidence.network: Background fetches observed: GET /candles?interval=5m, GET /market, GET /depth

assertions.title: Price details expandable

steps.action: Inspect swap card default state below CTA
steps.expected: A collapsed price-details section is visible by default
steps.observed: Placeholder text 'Enter an amount to see price details' is visible in the default swap card state.

steps.action: Attempt to expand price details by clicking the visible placeholder text
steps.expected: Section expands on click and shows exchange rate / price impact / minimum received, or explicit placeholder content when no quote
steps.observed: No expansion occurred; no exchange rate, price impact, or minimum received fields appeared, and accessibility snapshot showed no expandable control for price details.

evidence.network: Background fetches observed: GET /candles?interval=5m, GET /market, GET /depth

assertions.issues: Price details area is visible only as static placeholder text; it does not expose an expandable interaction to reveal detailed rows.

summary: Re-validated 2 assertions: VAL-SWAP-004 passed; VAL-SWAP-010 failed because price details did not expand to show detailed rows.
